channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Decode remote interviews without LeetCode
item.description: Cut interview failure rate by 60% with real system prep — LeetCode won’t save you in 2026 remote roles. Learn the stack, measure real metrics, and communicate async like a pro.

item.title: Message queues: the load balancer you never asked for
item.description: nt) adds ~30% latency compared to classic q with Load Balancing — decouple services, use a message queue.

item.title: Redis vs Memcached: 3 million ops/sec test
item.description: 00ms lose 12% more users than those under 5 with Redis — qualifying what kind of traffic, what language bin.

item.title: Rate limit clients without breaking them
item.description: Cut API 429 errors 89% and support tickets 78% with adaptive rate limiting — leaky buckets, Redis Lua, and Envoy caching in 2026 production. Machine-readable 429s and concurrency-aware buckets explained with code and numbers.

item.title: TypeScript strict pitfalls: 5 silent bugs
item.description: TypeScript: 5.6 added 15% faster builds, but the new JI. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Choose PostgreSQL when you need JSON indexes
item.description: Cut query latency to 3 ms at 10k RPM with PostgreSQL JSONB GIN indexes — real benchmarks, Docker setup, and the mistakes that cause 400 ms lookups. Ideal for semi-structured product data.

item.title: Stop Overloading Portfolios: Focus on Depth
item.description: Build a remote-ready portfolio: 2-3 polished projects, deployed on AWS, with clear docs. Skip quantity. This approach works for African developers by 2026.

item.title: Recovered from burnout: what actually worked
item.description: Cut freelance burnout 70% with three fixes — batching communication, shutdown rituals, and rate discipline. Measured metrics from 2026 freelance recovery show 40% fewer rollbacks and 60% faster sleep latency.

item.title: AI devs shipped real products in 2026
item.description: Ship production-ready products in 2026 with AI coding tools that actually work—ranked by real developers, with cost, speed, and failure scenarios. Cut development time by 60% or more.

item.title: MCP servers: the piece your stack is missing
item.description: Cut MCP transport cost 40% with caching and streaming — validate URIs, enforce timeouts, and pick the right SDK in 2026's definitive guide.

item.title: AI salaries 2026: the 2 skills that moved pay bands
item.description: Cut AI salary bands 22% with RAG or fine-tuning — concrete latency, cost, and hiring data for 2026. Compare two skills that actually move pay.

item.title: Why 2026 killed vibe coding in production
item.description: romise 30–50% time savings on boilerplate with AI coding tools cost — faster production releases.

item.title: Rewrite your backend for 5G users before they do
item.description: Cut mobile backend latency 56%: proxy, payload truncation, and the 5G metrics that expose hidden costs

item.title: Negotiate remote salaries below $50k in 3 calls
item.description: Land $70k remote roles from lower-cost countries: PPP math, anchor scripts, and the exact emails that got me $65k average — client objections, equity tricks, and when to walk away.

item.title: Vector DBs: when to use them (and when to skip)
item.description: Cut vector search latency from 60 ms to 8 ms and halve ingestion time with a simple schema change. Compare pgvector, Qdrant, and ClickHouse VectorIndex on real workloads and pick the right tool before you migrate.

item.title: Freelance rates that pay in 2024
item.description: Freelance developers leave $40k on the table yearly with wrong rates. Use the 2024 rate calculator to set floor, target, and premium rates with real metrics—benchmarks, client budgets, and risk adjustments included.

item.title: Instrument LLM pipelines like a pro
item.description: Cut AI pipeline debugging time by 70% with structured observability. Learn exactly what to log, trace, and alert on when your system includes an LLM — with Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, and Grafana.

item.title: Skip zero-trust’s checkboxes: small teams need this
item.description: Cut zero-trust setup time from months to days with a JWT gate at the edge — real latency numbers, cost deltas, and the security controls that actually matter for small teams. Zero-trust architecture for small teams: what actually makes sense to implement.

item.title: Pick the right dev platform in 5 minutes
item.description: Cut sandbox latency by 60% when choosing a dev platform in Africa — Andela vs Toptal vs Arc with real latency data, cost per hour, and hire-to-prod timelines for Lagos fintechs in 2026.

item.title: Monoliths are back in 2026 — and this time they're
item.description: Cut infra costs 40% and latency from 1.8s to 8ms — monoliths are back in 2026 and this is the exact stack to use for your budget tier
